arts.ttl: Hatters fan releases book about cycling to every Luton Town Premier League match for charity
arts.sum: A lifelong Hatters supporter has had two of the biggest names at Luton Town write the foreword to his latest book as he shares his journey of cycling to each Premier League away game for the team.

arts.ttl: Derby County player attracting attention from Portsmouth and Oxford United
arts.sum: Portsmouth and Oxford United are interested in a move for Derby County winger Joe Ward, according to a… The post Derby County player attracting attention from Portsmouth and Oxford United appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Luton boss concedes it has been 'difficult' leaving popular Mpanzu out of the Hatters XI
arts.sum: Midfielder barely used by Edwards this season

arts.ttl: Japanese international is likely to miss Luton's home clash with Rams
arts.sum: Defender suffers a slight muscle strain at Ewood Park

arts.ttl: Derby County transfer latest as Championship rivals eye Rams man
arts.sum: The versatile attacker, who can also play in defence, has only featured seven times so far this term with his last start coming in the goalless draw at Burnley earlier this month. With Ryan Nyambe making good progress on his return from injury and Kane Wilson currently in excellent form, Ward has been best-suited to a wing-back role in 3-5-2 formation.

arts.ttl: Luton chief confirms his interest in RWD Molenbeek defender Christ Makosso
arts.sum: Republic of Congo international rumoured to be closing in on a move to Kenilworth Road

arts.ttl: Hatters boss is confident Tom Lockyer will play for Luton again after he recovers from ankle surgery
arts.sum: Centre half required an operation after training ground injury

arts.ttl: My dad is a Derby County hero and now I've got Chelsea in my sights
arts.sum: The son of Derby County hero Mart Poom will be hoping to spring a major shock in the Europa League when Shamrock Rovers face Chelsea tonight. Markus Poom plays in midfield for the Irish side and travel to Stamford Bridge very much the underdogs against Enzo Maresca's Blues.

arts.ttl: Former Derby County striker linked with shock move to League One spenders
arts.sum: Former Derby County striker Patrick Bamford has been linked with a shock move to ambitious League One side Wrexham. Since then he has scored 56 goals in 183 league appearances for the Whites but has not really been able to cement his place in Leeds' frontline this season.
Aidan Perkins has a score prediction for all 12 matches taking place in the Championship across another busy weekend in the second tier.
